name: damp grotto
hints: A grotto with a deep pit and a stalagmite. The pit leads deeper underground but jumping is fatal.
TIE ROPE TO STALAGMITE to create a safe way down into the pit. Do NOT jump - it kills you.
TIE ROPE TO STALAGMITE, then GO PIT to climb down safely. Without the rope, the pit is a death trap. WEST returns to the hallway.
notes: Damp grotto with a deep pit and stalagmite. JUMP PIT is fatal. Must TIE ROPE TO STALAGMITE first to create a safe descent into the pit (room 33). West leads to the musty hallway (room 27). The rope is an essential item for this puzzle.
